# The Customer Loyalty Evolution: Travelex, Iterable & Miltton’s Winning Formula

Webinar

# The Customer Loyalty Evolution: Travelex, Iterable & Miltton’s Winning Formula

July 30, 2025

45 minutes

On demand

## Description

Travelex has redefined its approach to customer engagement in partnership with Iterable and Miltton. Through the Travelex Plus loyalty program, they’ve transformed how they connect with customers, using data-driven engagement to deliver more personalised and impactful experiences. Discover how this innovative partnership empowers Travelex to unlock valuable customer insights, explore real-time segmentation and push the limits of loyalty innovation with cutting-edge technology.  
  
We’ll cover how to:

How Miltton’s expertise empowered Travelex to scale execution and drive innovation.

How Travelex, Iterable & Miltton built and launched the Travelex Plus loyalty program

The impact of data-driven strategies on customer engagement

How real-time segmentation shapes customer experiences
